metadata.title: TonuxCorp — Senior Tech Consultant & CTO
metadata.description: Senior tech consultant with 12+ years of experience. Architecture consulting, custom development, technical leadership and training.

hero.subtitle: Software Consultant
hero.intro: It's Tonux, a senior tech consultant & CTO
hero.description: I help institutions, businesses and individuals design, develop and manage tailored technology solutions.
hero.title: Senior Tech Consultant & CTO

about_summary.title: Who am I
about_summary.description: Senior developer and tech consultant with a strong background in designing web, mobile and system applications. I specialize in delivering innovative and high-performance solutions, backed by deep technical expertise and proven leadership.

items.title: IT Consulting & Architecture
items.description: Technical audits, solution architecture, technology selection, and digital transformation support for businesses and institutions.

items.title: Custom Development
items.description: Design and development of custom web, mobile and API applications.

items.title: Technical Leadership (CTO as a Service)
items.description: Technical project management, best practices implementation, tech recruitment, team and product scaling.

items.title: Training & Mentoring
items.description: Custom corporate training, bootcamps, individual mentoring. From beginner to advanced.

dropcolis.title: Dropcolis Canada
dropcolis.description: Parcel delivery service in Quebec. Express 24h delivery, e-commerce fulfillment, intercity delivery and groupage.
dropcolis.highlight: Complete delivery management platform with mobile app (iOS & Android) and web admin interface.

footer.tagline: Senior Tech Consultant & CTO — Montreal, Canada

about_page.title: About me
about_page.bio: Senior developer and tech consultant with over 12 years of experience designing and developing technology solutions. Based in Montreal, I work with clients in Canada, France and West Africa. My journey from Dakar to Rouen and then Montreal has enriched my perspective and ability to navigate multicultural environments.

values.title: Technical excellence
values.description: Clean code, solid architecture, and best practices are at the heart of every project.

values.title: Communication
values.description: Transparency and constant collaboration with clients to ensure success.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: Continuous technology watch to provide the most suitable solutions.

services_page.title: My services
services_page.subtitle: Technology solutions tailored to your challenges

process_steps.title: Discovery
process_steps.description: In-depth discussion to understand your needs, constraints and objectives.

process_steps.title: Execution
process_steps.description: Iterative development with regular check-ins and incremental deliveries.

process_steps.title: Delivery
process_steps.description: Production deployment, training and post-delivery support.

faq.question: What types of projects do you take on?
faq.answer: I work on projects of all sizes: from startup MVPs to complex enterprise systems. Web, mobile, API, cloud architecture.

faq.question: Do you work remotely?
faq.answer: Yes, I primarily work remotely from Montreal. I'm available for video meetings and occasional on-site visits if needed.

faq.question: What is your availability?
faq.answer: My availability varies depending on current engagements. Contact me to discuss your project and check my availability.

dropcolis_page.title: Dropcolis Canada
dropcolis_page.subtitle: Co-founder & CTO
dropcolis_page.story: Dropcolis was born from the observation that Quebec's delivery market lacked a flexible and affordable solution for small and medium businesses. As CTO and co-founder, I designed and led the development of the entire technical platform.

formation_page.title: Training & Mentoring
formation_page.subtitle: Over 500 students trained in Africa and Canada
formation_page.approach: I believe in learning by doing. My training programs combine essential theory with hands-on projects to help learners develop directly applicable skills.

programs.title: Full-Stack Web Development
programs.description: Complete training covering HTML/CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js and databases.

programs.title: Mobile Development
programs.description: Learning Flutter and React Native to build cross-platform applications.

programs.title: Individual Mentoring
programs.description: Personalized support to develop your skills and tech career.
